path_tech_lead.name: Technical Lead
path_tech_lead.description: Progress from senior engineer to technical leadership and team management
path_tech_lead.prerequisites: 5+ years professional experience, proven technical expertise

path_project_manager.name: Project Manager
path_project_manager.description: Develop skills to transition into project management and delivery leadership

path_product.name: Product Manager
path_product.description: Transition into product management with focus on strategy and customer success
path_product.prerequisites: Experience with product or customer interaction

path_specialist.name: Subject Matter Expert
path_specialist.description: Develop deep expertise in a specific domain and become the go-to specialist
